items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the support for immediate vs digest modes, as stated in the linked use case. However, the provided evidence does not include any checks or data related to this specific requirement, indicating a lack of coverage. Without concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm or deny this functionality, the assessment remains inconclusive.
